headline: Robinhood Buyback And Credit Line Tested By Valuation Concerns
summary: Robinhood Markets (NasdaqGS:HOOD) has authorized a new $1.5b share repurchase program to be carried out over three years, with no fixed expiration date. The company has also secured a $3.25b credit facility from JPMorgan to support the buyback and provide additional financial flexibility. The moves come as the broker faces weaker crypto trading revenue and a sharply lower share price in 2026. For investors watching Robinhood at $72.54 per share, the new buyback sits against a mixed...

headline: Sanas Broadens Real‑Time Speech AI Platform for Global Enterprises
summary: Sanas, the Speech AI Platform built for enterprise communication, today announced the launch of Real-Time Language Translation alongside a major upgrade to Speech Enhancement. Together, these capabilities advance Sanas' evolution from an accent tool into a full-scale speech ecosystem helping enterprises communicate without barriers.

headline: Jefferies initiates Robinhood at Buy, citing path to ‘financial super app’
summary: Investing.com -- Jefferies initiated coverage of Robinhood Markets with a Buy rating and an $88 price target in a note Thursday, arguing the company is positioned to evolve from a retail brokerage into a broad financial services “super app.”
